source: How to Read a Keepa Chart (FULL Tutorial) Amazon FBA 2024.txt @04:27 — seller count jumped 7->21 (ratio=3.0, our offers-rising trigger at 1.4x fires easily) yet buy box price stayed steady ~$96-97; narrator: 'this is a healthy listing... overall I think this is a good listing.' DIVERGENCE NOTE: our offers-rising adjustment WILL fire numerically even though the narrator calls this healthy overall — a real case where the scored penalty doesn't reflect the full picture the narrator sees (price stability outweighing the offer-count jump).
